prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene using LinearTransformationScene to explain how a matrix changes the basis vectors and a unit square. Keep the matrix visible, show a preview of the target shape, and use staged captions so the geometric effect is easy to follow.
completion:
from manim import *

class LinearTransformationBasisStory(LinearTransformationScene):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            show_coordinates=True,
            leave_ghost_vectors=True,
            show_basis_vectors=False,
            background_plane_kwargs={"background_line_style": {"stroke_opacity": 0.3}},
            **kwargs,
        )

    def construct(self):
        matrix = [[1, 1], [-1, 2]]
        title = Text("A Matrix Rebuilds the Basis", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        matrix_label = Text("matrix A", font_size=22, color=GRAY_D).to_corner(UR)
        matrix_display = IntegerMatrix(matrix).next_to(matrix_label, DOWN, buff=0.15)
        square = Square(side_length=1.25, color=TEAL_D, fill_color=TEAL_E, fill_opacity=0.22).shift(RIGHT * 0.6 + UP * 0.55)
        preview = square.copy().apply_matrix(matrix).set_stroke(YELLOW_D, opacity=0.65).set_fill(YELLOW_D, opacity=0.08)
        i_vector = Vector([1, 0], color=GREEN_D)
        j_vector = Vector([0, 1], color=BLUE_D)
        i_label = always_redraw(lambda: MathTex(r"\\hat{\imath}", color=GREEN_D).scale(0.8).next_to(i_vector.get_end(), DOWN + RIGHT, buff=0.12))
        j_label = always_redraw(lambda: MathTex(r"\\hat{\jmath}", color=BLUE_D).scale(0.8).next_to(j_vector.get_end(), UP + LEFT, buff=0.12))
        caption_a = Text("The unit square and basis vectors describe the original coordinate frame.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("A preview helps separate the target geometry from the animation itself.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Once the matrix acts, both the square and the basis vectors deform together.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.add_foreground_mobjects(title, matrix_label, matrix_display)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(matrix_label), FadeIn(matrix_display), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(square), GrowArrow(i_vector), GrowArrow(j_vector), FadeIn(i_label), FadeIn(j_label), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(preview), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeOut(preview), run_time=1)
        self.add_transformable_mobject(square, i_vector, j_vector)
        self.apply_matrix(matrix, run_time=6)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), Indicate(square, color=TEAL_A), Indicate(i_vector, color=GREEN_A), Indicate(j_vector, color=BLUE_A), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that uses an ImplicitFunction as a decision boundary on a number plane. Show sample points on both sides, move a tracked probe across the boundary, and use staged captions so the region switch is visually obvious.
completion:
from manim import *

class ImplicitDecisionBoundaryProbeStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def boundary_value(x, y):
            return ((x + 1.1) / 1.7) ** 2 + ((y - 0.1) / 1.15) ** 2 - 1.0

        def probe_y(x):
            return 0.45 * np.sin(1.15 * x) - 0.15

        title = Text("Reading an Implicit Decision Boundary", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-4, 4, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.28})
        boundary = ImplicitFunction(boundary_value, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5)
        inside_points = VGroup(*[
            Dot(point, color=TEAL_D, radius=0.08)
            for point in [(-1.4, 0.6, 0), (-0.5, -0.2, 0), (-1.9, -0.4, 0)]
        ])
        outside_points = VGroup(*[
            Dot(point, color=RED_D, radius=0.08)
            for point in [(1.8, 1.3, 0), (2.6, -0.5, 0), (-3.1, 1.4, 0)]
        ])
        inside_label = Text("inside: class A", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).move_to(LEFT * 2.5 + UP * 2.2)
        outside_label = Text("outside: class B", font_size=22, color=RED_D).move_to(RIGHT * 2.3 + UP * 2.2)
        tracker = ValueTracker(-3.4)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(np.array([tracker.get_value(), probe_y(tracker.get_value()), 0]), color=TEAL_D if boundary_value(tracker.get_value(), probe_y(tracker.get_value())) <= 0 else RED_D, radius=0.09))
        halo = always_redraw(lambda: Circle(radius=0.24, color=probe.get_color(), stroke_width=3).move_to(probe.get_center()))
        readout = always_redraw(
            lambda: VGroup(
                Text("region", font_size=22, color=GRAY_D),
                Text(
                    "class A" if boundary_value(tracker.get_value(), probe_y(tracker.get_value())) <= 0 else "class B",
                    font_size=28,
                    color=TEAL_D if boundary_value(tracker.get_value(), probe_y(tracker.get_value())) <= 0 else RED_D,
                ),
            ).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.7)
        )
        caption_a = Text("The implicit curve splits the plane into two decision regions.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("A moving probe makes it easier to see exactly when the class assignment flips.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Crossing the boundary changes the sign of the rule, so the label changes too.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), Create(boundary), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in inside_points], lag_ratio=0.12), FadeIn(inside_label), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in outside_points], lag_ratio=0.12), FadeIn(outside_label), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), Create(halo), FadeIn(readout), tracker.animate.set_value(-1.0), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=6)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(1.6), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=6)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(0.1), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that shows a code snippet on the left and a three-stage pipeline diagram on the right. Move a highlight box across logical sections of the code while arrows and captions explain how the input, transform, and output stages relate.
completion:
from manim import *

class CodePipelineHighlightStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        code_text = """tokens = load_batch()\nfeatures = encode(tokens)\nsummary = pool(features)\nlabel = classify(summary)\nprint(label)"""
        title = Text("Linking Code to a Visual Pipeline", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        code_panel = Code(code=code_text, tab_width=4, language="python", background="window", style="monokai", insert_line_no=False).scale(0.58).to_edge(LEFT).shift(DOWN * 0.15)
        code_frame = SurroundingRectangle(code_panel, color=GRAY_B, buff=0.12)
        code_focus_a = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=4.7, height=0.85, color=BLUE_D, stroke_width=3).move_to(code_panel.get_center() + UP * 1.0)
        code_focus_b = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=4.7, height=0.85, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=3).move_to(code_panel.get_center() + UP * 0.05)
        code_focus_c = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=4.7, height=1.1, color=GREEN_D, stroke_width=3).move_to(code_panel.get_center() + DOWN * 0.95)
        stage_boxes = VGroup(*[
            RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.12, width=2.25, height=1.0, color=color, fill_color=color, fill_opacity=0.16)
            for color in [BLUE_D, YELLOW_D, GREEN_D]
        ]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.8).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.1)
        stage_labels = VGroup(
            Text("input", font_size=24).move_to(stage_boxes[0]),
            Text("transform", font_size=24).move_to(stage_boxes[1]),
            Text("output", font_size=24).move_to(stage_boxes[2]),
        )
        arrows = VGroup(
            Arrow(stage_boxes[0].get_bottom(), stage_boxes[1].get_top(), buff=0.12, color=GRAY_B),
            Arrow(stage_boxes[1].get_bottom(), stage_boxes[2].get_top(), buff=0.12, color=GRAY_B),
        )
        stage_focus_a = SurroundingRectangle(stage_boxes[0], color=BLUE_D, buff=0.12)
        stage_focus_b = SurroundingRectangle(stage_boxes[1], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.12)
        stage_focus_c = SurroundingRectangle(stage_boxes[2], color=GREEN_D, buff=0.12)
        connector_arrow = Arrow(code_panel.get_right() + RIGHT * 0.15, stage_boxes[1].get_left() + LEFT * 0.15, buff=0.0, color=GRAY_C)
        caption_a = Text("The first lines load and encode the input before any decision is made.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("The middle step compresses the representation into a usable summary.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The final lines turn that summary into an output the pipeline can report.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(code_panel), Create(code_frame), FadeIn(stage_boxes), FadeIn(stage_labels), run_time=4)
        self.play(GrowArrow(arrows[0]), GrowArrow(arrows[1]), GrowArrow(connector_arrow), Create(code_focus_a), Create(stage_focus_a), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(code_focus_a, code_focus_b), ReplacementTransform(stage_focus_a, stage_focus_b), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(code_focus_b, code_focus_c), ReplacementTransform(stage_focus_b, stage_focus_c), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=5)
        self.play(Indicate(stage_boxes[2], color=GREEN_A), Indicate(code_focus_c, color=GREEN_A), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)
